verses.text: Do not after Egypt or Canaan, but keep God's judgments and live. Be different. God's people walk apart from the nations.
Do not after Egypt or Canaan, but keep God's judgments and live. Be different. God's people walk apart from the nations.
Do not after Egypt or Canaan, but keep God's judgments and live. Be different. God's people walk apart from the nations.
Do not after Egypt or Canaan, but keep God's judgments and live. Be different. God's people walk apart from the nations.
Do not after Egypt or Canaan, but keep God's judgments and live. Be different. God's people walk apart from the nations.
None shall approach near of kin to uncover nakedness. Forbidden. Family bonds are not to be defiled.
None shall approach near of kin to uncover nakedness. Forbidden. Family bonds are not to be defiled.
None shall approach near of kin to uncover nakedness. Forbidden. Family bonds are not to be defiled.
Sister, granddaughter, and step-sister are forbidden. Kindred. Close relations are off limits.
Sister, granddaughter, and step-sister are forbidden. Kindred. Close relations are off limits.
Sister, granddaughter, and step-sister are forbidden. Kindred. Close relations are off limits.
Aunt by blood or by marriage is forbidden. More kin. The circle of forbidden ties is wide.
Aunt by blood or by marriage is forbidden. More kin. The circle of forbidden ties is wide.
Aunt by blood or by marriage is forbidden. More kin. The circle of forbidden ties is wide.
Daughter-in-law and brother's wife are forbidden. In-laws. Marriage ties are honoured.
Daughter-in-law and brother's wife are forbidden. In-laws. Marriage ties are honoured.
A woman and her daughter, or two sisters, are forbidden. Doubled. Such unions are wickedness.
A woman and her daughter, or two sisters, are forbidden. Doubled. Such unions are wickedness.
Approach not in separation, nor lie with thy neighbour's wife. Purity. Even lawful is bounded by holiness.
Approach not in separation, nor lie with thy neighbour's wife. Purity. Even lawful is bounded by holiness.
Pass not thy seed to Molech; lie not with man or beast. Abominations. The vilest sins are named and barred.
Pass not thy seed to Molech; lie not with man or beast. Abominations. The vilest sins are named and barred.
Pass not thy seed to Molech; lie not with man or beast. Abominations. The vilest sins are named and barred.
The nations defiled themselves, and the land vomited them out. Defiled land. Sin pollutes even the ground.
The nations defiled themselves, and the land vomited them out. Defiled land. Sin pollutes even the ground.
Keep the statutes, lest the land spue you out also. Warning. Israel too will be cast out if they sin.
Keep the statutes, lest the land spue you out also. Warning. Israel too will be cast out if they sin.
Keep the statutes, lest the land spue you out also. Warning. Israel too will be cast out if they sin.
Whoever does these abominations is cut off. Cut off. The holy people must keep clean.
Whoever does these abominations is cut off. Cut off. The holy people must keep clean.
